scripts.build: vite build && cp level1_*_codelogic.py level1_*_requirements*.py level1_*_syntax.py dist/
scripts.check:graders: npm run validate:graders -- --max-failures=0 && npm run audit:graders -- --max-weak-functions 0 --max-unguarded-single-case-no-arg-functions 0 --max-single-case-scripts 526 --max-unguarded-single-case-scripts 0 --max-hardcode-risk-scripts 0 --max-empty-graders 0 && npm run audit:metamorphic -- --min-covered 336 && npm run audit:script-fallback -- --min-eligible 1332 --max-blocked 107 && npm run audit:solutions -- --max-mislabeled=0 && npm run test:script-fallback
